basics.name: Marcos Portales
basics.label: Full-Stack Developer · AI, modern web & IIoT
basics.summary: Full-Stack developer with a problem-solving mindset, fast learning curve, and a passion for fluid, accessible, and maintainable interfaces. Experienced across React, Next.js, Vue, Astro, Node.js, NestJS, and Spring Boot; API integration, performance optimization, and SQL and NoSQL databases. I also work with AI tooling, IIoT platforms, and communication protocols for connected systems. Based in Moriles, Córdoba, Spain.

work.name: Equilateral Cloud S.L
work.summary: Built modern web apps integrating AI models to automate internal workflows and improve UX. Next.js hybrid rendering (SSR/ISR), Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL, and scalable APIs.
highlights: AI automations that reduced manual work

work.name: ANF Autoridad de Certificación
work.summary: Maintained and improved critical e-signature and document management systems used by thousands of users nationwide, with a focus on security and performance.
highlights: Refactored legacy Vue components to reduce technical debt

work.name: EFE Valparaíso
work.summary: Metro network event simulator with interactive D3.js visualizations and dynamic dashboards for real-time interpretation of complex data.
highlights: Reusable components integrated with external APIs

work.name: UCLV — IT & Communications Division
work.summary: Internal management systems with Java, Spring Boot, and Vaadin; PostgreSQL modeling and optimization under GitLab CI/CD.
highlights: Front-end architecture improvements that reduced recurring bugs

education.institution: Central University "Marta Abreu" of Las Villas (UCLV)

projects.name: LC3 Eco-Cement Plant IIoT Platform
projects.description: IIoT supervision for an eco-cement plant: PLC-captured process variables streamed to ThingsBoard, REST and WebSocket APIs, PostgreSQL persistence, and a React web app for monitoring and control.

projects.name: SaaS billing platform
projects.description: Multi-tenant SaaS billing platform: FastAPI REST API for customers, products, invoices, payments, webhooks, and PDF generation, plus an Angular admin panel with RBAC.
highlights: JWT auth, invoices, payments, webhooks, and PDF
Angular admin panel with RBAC and E2E tests
